vocab.meaning: hứng thú nhất thời, nhanh đến nhanh đi
vocab.example: I had a fleeting interest in coin collecting, but it was soon eclipsed by my passion for drawing.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực/hoạt động sáng tạo nghệ thuật
vocab.example: My parents always encouraged my artistic endeavors, providing me with all the paints and canvases I needed.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sống động
vocab.example: As a child with a vivid imagination, I used to spend hours creating elaborate backstories for my action figures.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động thực hành, làm bằng tay
vocab.example: I gravitated toward hands-on activities like pottery because I loved the sensation of working with clay.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Building intricate models from scratch really helped me develop strong spatial awareness at a young age.

vocab.meaning: tính cách ham mê cạnh tranh/đua tranh
vocab.example: Playing chess in elementary school definitely brought out my competitive streak.

vocab.meaning: sự thành thạo về mặt kỹ thuật
vocab.example: I spent countless hours practicing the violin to achieve a basic level of technical proficiency.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn, trút bỏ căng thẳng
vocab.example: Gardening with my grandmother was the primary way I would unwind after a long day at school.

vocab.meaning: bản tính quá say mê/ám ảnh (với một sở thích nào đó)
vocab.example: Due to my obsessive nature, I didn't just read comic books; I cataloged every single issue I owned.

vocab.meaning: nguồn cảm hứng/ngọn lửa sáng tạo
vocab.example: Joining the local drama club really ignited a creative spark in me that influenced my career choice later on.
